# Jolan Chappaz

> Jolan Chappaz is a Swiss hand-poked tattoo artist, graphic artist and poet, working between Geneva and Villars-sur-Ollon, Switzerland. His practice spans tattooing, painting, poetry and self-published artist books, rooted in Swiss folk art and the history of tattooing.

Jolan grew up in the Swiss Alps and holds a master's degree in communication and journalism. He tattoos exclusively by hand (machine-free) at Nuit Noire Tattoo in Geneva and from his home atelier in Villars-sur-Ollon. His designs draw on Swiss folk art and traditional tattoo history. Alongside tattooing he writes poetry and songs, paints, and produces limited-edition printed works.

## Work

- [Tattoos](https://jolanchappaz.ch/): Hand-poked, machine-free tattoos inspired by the history of tattooing and Swiss folk art. Based at Nuit Noire Tattoo, Geneva. Personal projects considered.
- [Paintings](https://jolanchappaz.ch/): "Quick and painless" — acrylic on cardboard (40x55 cm), each painted in under an hour.
- [Bonne Nuit (2025)](https://jolanchappaz.ch/): First collection of poems and flash tattoos. Hand-assembled box set, limited edition of 100 copies. Printed by Kaleidoskop Editions, Martigny, Switzerland.
- [À la fin (2024)](https://jolanchappaz.ch/): An ongoing artistic dialogue with visual artist Cécile Giovannini, combining her paintings and Jolan's poems. Residency at the Flore-Alpe botanical garden, Champex-Lac.
- [Merch](https://jolanchappaz.ch/): Screen-printed bandanas and limited fine-art prints.

## Contact

- Email: workwithjolan@outlook.com
